python:3.12-slim\n\nWORKDIR /app\n\n# Install dependencies\nCOPY requirements.txt .\nRUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt\n\n# Install SQLite with FTS5\nRUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y sqlite3 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*\n\n# Copy application\nCOPY . .\n\n# Create data directory\nRUN mkdir -p /data\n\nEXPOSE 8080\n\nENV MNEMOSYNE_DB_PATH=/data/mnemosyne.db\nENV 8:["$","$L6",null,{"code":"version: \"3.8\"\n\nservices:\nmnemosyne:\n  build: .\n  ports:\n    - \"8080:8080\"\n  volumes:\n    - mnemosyne-data:/data\n  environment:\n    - MNEMOSYNE_DB_PATH=/data/mnemosyne.db\n    - MNEMOSYNE_API_KEY=your-api-key\n    - OPENAI_API_KEY=your-openai-key\n  restart: unless-stopped\n  healthcheck:\n    test: [\"CMD\", \"curl\", \"-f\", \"http://localhost:8080/health\"]\n    interval: 30s\n    timeout: 10s\n    retries: 3\n\nvolumes:\nmnemosyne-data:\n","language":"yaml"}]
